pr.title: Skip repo pulse and burndown workflows on forks
pr.author: afscrome

failed_jobs.name: Tests / Hosting-1 / Hosting-1 (8-core-ubuntu-latest)
failed_jobs.reason: ParentProcessLifetimeReusesResourcesAcrossAppRestartsAndStopsWhenParentExits failed because DCP rejected a container/executable creation with BadRequest due to timestamp parsing error ('parsing time "0001-01-01T00:06:30Z" as "2006-01-02T15:04:05.000000Z07:00": cannot parse "Z" as ".000000"'). This is a known intermittent DCP issue unrelated to the PR, which only changed GitHub Actions workflow YAML files.
